$curated: State-composition gate for game-picker (Template B — game-picker.gen.json maps mx-node:game-picker/scope to MxCard, but the FE keys it on a Material DropdownButton, not an MxCard; and the four game rows are dynamic ListTiles keyed gamePick-<type>, not literal mx-node nodes — so there is no fixed MxCard to gate à la review; a Template-A cast<MxCard>() would find nothing). Assert the keyed CONTAINER set per state; never cast. Chrome (screen/appbar) is excluded from the gate universe (matches dashboard.states.json). UNIVERSE = the two true state-discriminators: scope (the picker's scope DropdownButton — default only) and add-cards (the not-enough CTA — not-enough only). default (deck has >=1 card) renders the picker → scope present, add-cards absent; not-enough (deck has 0 cards) renders the empty-state → add-cards present, scope absent. COVERAGE GAPS (not gated): scope-dropdown (opening the DropdownButton pops a Material menu overlay of DropdownMenuItems — NOT the kit's bottom-sheet with keyed scope-srs/all/unlearned items; the overlay does not change the keyed node-set, so it is the same node-set as default), loading (the async initState _load leaves _count==null → MxStateView.loading, no keyed body node). BEHAVIOR DIVERGENCE (documented in intent-ledger, verified against docs/business/game/game-modes.md which sets NO minimum-words rule — the kit banner's 'at least 4 words' is a design detail, not a business rule): the FE enters not-enough ONLY at count==0 (an empty deck), whereas the kit shows the not-enough banner for a deck with fewer than 4 words; a 1..3-card deck still opens the picker in the FE. Identity-rollout gaps (kit nodes not keyed in the FE): game-picker/game-matching|game-mc|game-recall|game-typing (dynamic gamePick-<type> ListTiles), scope-scrim/scope-sheet/scope-srs/scope-all/scope-unlearned (Material dropdown menu, not a keyed sheet), not-enough (container; only add-cards inside is keyed), back (in MxAppBar), words-hint (unkeyed MxText). Cross-checked by test/presentation/features/game/game_picker_states_test.dart.
